speaker: seller

args.message: Well-maintained 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT, ready for your family adventures! This beauty boasts leather seats, Bose sound, and that powerful 5.3L V8 engine you know and love. Dealer-serviced and runs like a dream – you won't find a better deal!

args.message: Hi there. This Tahoe sounds great. Has it ever been in any accidents?

text: Hi there. This Tahoe sounds great. Has it ever been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not a one! Clean history on this gem, never so much as a fender bender. We only sell the best pre-owned vehicles here, and this Tahoe is a prime example. You can tell it's been well cared for, right?

args.message: That's great to hear about the history. I'm very interested in the Tahoe. My budget is pretty firm at $22,000. Would you be able to meet me there?

speaker: seller

args.message: Twenty-two thousand? I appreciate the offer, but that's a bit lower than I can go on this incredible Tahoe. I've seen similar models at auction go for much higher, and this one is in fantastic condition. How about we meet in the middle at $24,900? It's a solid price for a vehicle of this caliber.
